default.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃ s̃h̃õw̃s̃ c̃l̃ẽãr̃ s̃t̃r̃ũc̃t̃ũr̃ãl̃ p̃r̃õg̃r̃ẽs̃s̃ĩõñ. ⟧⟧

burst_pattern.text: ⟦⟦ S̃h̃õr̃t̃ b̃ũr̃s̃t̃s̃ õf̃ ĩñt̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ ãp̃p̃ẽãr̃ t̃h̃r̃õũg̃h̃õũt̃ t̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃. ⟧⟧

climax_spike.text: ⟦⟦ Ã ñõt̃ãb̃l̃ẽ s̃p̃ĩk̃ẽ õc̃c̃ũr̃s̃ ñẽãr̃ t̃h̃ẽ l̃ãt̃ẽ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃. ⟧⟧

gradual_build.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ s̃t̃r̃ũc̃t̃ũr̃ẽ g̃r̃ãd̃ũãl̃l̃ỹ ĩñc̃r̃ẽãs̃ẽs̃ ĩñ p̃r̃ẽs̃s̃ũr̃ẽ õṽẽr̃ t̃ĩm̃ẽ. ⟧⟧
